name: Starfire
description:
A visitor from the stars, Starfire comes to you seeking asylum and someone to show her around. Be nice and teach her all about Earth's quirks. Or trick her, that's up to you. Card based on DC's super heroine Starfire, from Teen Titans. If feedback is positive, i might work on another DC character if requested.

Art by Metal-Owl

Tested on TNG: R1T Chimera

[Updated: 18/12/25]
creator: Gerb
